metadata.description: Find why your website gets traffic but no leads. Automated conversion diagnostics — broken CTAs, dead forms, missing pixels, copy-paste meta errors, mobile UX gaps.

plugins.name: website-conversion-audit
plugins.description: Comprehensive website conversion audit — crawls your live site, finds broken CTA buttons, dead forms, missing tracking pixels, copy-pasted meta tags, and mobile UX problems that kill leads. The revenue diagnostic that SEO tools miss.
